$comment: QBP dark-matter fork fixture for Issues #23, #24, #25. Shared prefix is QBP-derived algebraic structure; Branch A is conformal gravity (minimal, no DM); Branch B is ΛCDM-extended (DM particle and halo profile). FLAG-rotcurve-B-uses-A is intentionally branch-inconsistent to exercise #25.

axioms.name: Information is preserved
axioms.statement: No physical process destroys information; selects division algebras.

axioms.name: The encoding is maximal
axioms.statement: Boundary encoding uses the largest normed division algebra (octonions).

anchors.name: Quaternion subalgebra closure
anchors.description: Lean Q1-Q2: H closed under multiplication; Hamilton table verified.

anchors.name: Hessian spectrum {0(x16), 4(x4), 8(x8), 12(x4)}
anchors.description: Verified at all 42 ZDs; provides natural QEC block structure.

anchors.name: Eigenvalue ratios 12:8:4 with multiplicities (4,8,4)
anchors.description: Defines code rate and gauge-eigenspace decomposition.

anchors.name: Gauge group derivation from spectral action
anchors.description: SU(2)×U(1) emerges from the spectral action on the algebraic kernel.

anchors.name: Bi2Se3 topological insulator class verified
anchors.description: Materials prediction from gauge group: Z2 invariant correct.

anchors.name: No new dark matter particle below 100 TeV
anchors.description: Branch A prediction: rotation curves and structure formation explained by α₀=0.846 conformal-gravity correction without an additional particle.
anchors.testable_when: LHC HL-phase + direct detection null results through 2030

anchors.name: Conformal gravity matches CMB acoustic peaks within 5% without DM
anchors.description: Branch A: Mannheim-style conformal gravity + baryons reproduces first three peaks; needs explicit chi-squared fit.

anchors.name: DM particle mass in [10 GeV, 10 TeV]
anchors.description: Branch B: standard ΛCDM range subject to direct detection constraints.

anchors.name: Halo mass function follows Sheth-Tormen with σ8 = 0.81
anchors.description: Branch B prediction from NFW-profiled simulations.

anchors.name: Branch-inconsistent: B-side rotation curve fit referencing α₀ correction
anchors.description: Intentionally planted branch inconsistency: a Branch B anchor whose prediction_chain pulls INPUT-alpha0-correction (a Branch A input). Issue #25's CheckBranchConsistency must flag this.
anchors.notes: Do not fix. This anchor is the regression target for #25.

inputs.name: Conformal gravity correction α₀ = 0.846
inputs.notes: Branch A input. Drawn from Mannheim's spherically symmetric solutions.

inputs.name: Baryon density Ω_b = 0.0493
inputs.notes: Shared input — used by both branches; lives in shared prefix.

inputs.name: Dark matter density Ω_DM = 0.26
inputs.notes: Branch B input. ΛCDM cold dark matter density.

inputs.name: NFW scale radius rs
inputs.notes: Branch B input. Halo profile parameter.

chains.name: Quaternion closure + spectral action → gauge group
α₀ correction → rotation curves without DM
Ω_DM + NFW + σ8 → halo mass function

fork_points.question: Does cosmological structure require an additional dark-matter particle, or is it explained by a conformal-gravity correction?

branches.name: No DM (conformal gravity)
branches.hypothesis: Galactic and cosmological observations are explained by an α₀=0.846 conformal-gravity correction; no new particle required.

branches.name: DM exists (ΛCDM)
branches.hypothesis: A weakly-interacting massive particle with Ω_DM=0.26 and an NFW halo profile explains observations.

interpretations.interpretation: Flat rotation curves emerge from α₀ correction at galactic radii.
Flat rotation curves require an NFW halo with rs and Ω_DM.
Conformal gravity reproduces lensing offset only with auxiliary baryonic gas physics.
Lensing peak offset from gas peak is direct evidence of collisionless DM.
Three-peak structure achievable with α₀ correction; pending explicit fit.
Peak ratios determine Ω_DM/Ω_b; fits with Ω_DM=0.26.
Early massive galaxies easier in conformal-gravity structure formation.
Tension with ΛCDM σ8 normalization; under active investigation.

changelog.note: Initial DM fork fixture seeded for Issues #23, #24, #25, #27. FLAG-rotcurve-B-uses-A is intentionally branch-inconsistent.
